title: clusia duartei
intro: Clusia duartei, also known as Clusia rosea, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a type of evergreen tree with medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The leaves of Clusia duartei contain flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as wound healing, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, Clusia duartei leaves are often prepared as a decoction or infused in water to treat various ailments, and they can also be used to make herbal teas and infusions.
